_comment: Verified 2026-06-30 from www.perplexity.ai DOM inspection. Input is unique-id contenteditable div#ask-input[role='textbox']. Send button is button[aria-label='Submit'] (only enabled when text typed — same pattern as Claude). Response container is div#markdown-content-0 (unique id for latest answer — ID rotates per query, always 0 for active answer). Fallback to div.prose.dark:prose-invert which is the markdown prose class. No stop button — rely on DOM stabilization. Login detection uses a[href*='login'] / a[href*='signin'].
